contradictions.likely_cause: The rows are not a controlled same-system benchmark: diagnostic medium uses a small deterministic validation setup, while manuscript recreation uses notebook-inspired figure-family settings, different geometry/noise/clock assumptions, and manuscript-style output semantics.
contradictions.next_diagnostic_action: Create a single benchmark runner that drives Step B and C7 through the exact same geometry, noise, links, seeds, and clock sigma.
contradictions.numerical_mismatch: C7 diagnostic Stage C position 0.0393877 m versus C7 manuscript recreation Stage C position 180.203 m; ratio about 4575.11
contradictions.quarantine_decision: Do not compare these as evidence of algorithm performance until a normalized benchmark card is run across both paths.

contradictions.likely_cause: Legacy uses all-clock state, truth-error acceptance/fallback behavior, all-clock synchronization metric, and smoothing/fitting transforms; C7 uses non-truth safeguards and package-native metrics.
contradictions.next_diagnostic_action: Run a normalized clock-sweep benchmark with raw Stage A/B/C metrics, no smoothing, and explicit clock-unit conversion audit.
contradictions.numerical_mismatch: Legacy replay reports refined position below 0.06 m at all seven clock points after truth-gated fallback behavior; C7 bounded/sparse clock-sweep reports candidate-failed localization at high clock standard deviation.
contradictions.quarantine_decision: Use legacy clock sweep as reference only and C7 clock sweep as debugging evidence only.

contradictions.likely_cause: Historical figure labels are algorithm-stage labels, not full pipeline tuple identifiers.
contradictions.next_diagnostic_action: Add pipeline tuple labels to future summary CSV/metadata and figure notes.
contradictions.numerical_mismatch: Same label can refer to legacy truth-gated all-clock MAP, Step B LM-only, generic dynamic SCI/SFI, or C7 residual-covariance safeguard.
contradictions.quarantine_decision: Every new result must include the explicit system/A/B/C tuple before being discussed as evidence.
contradictions.source_b: package-native and C7 labels coarse/refined JCLS

contradictions.likely_cause: Diagnostic and candidate plots intentionally mimic figure families for review.
contradictions.next_diagnostic_action: Keep RESULT_VERSION_LINEAGE_AND_UNITS_REVIEW as the first lookup before discussing figures.
contradictions.numerical_mismatch: No inspected current output claims manuscript_ready=true, but many PDFs resemble manuscript figures.
contradictions.quarantine_decision: Do not cite any generated PDF unless its lineage row is promoted by human signoff.

clock_units.clock_error_conversion: range-equivalent km divided by c_km_per_s, then multiplied by 1e9 for ns plots
clock_units.clock_sigma_internal_units: range-equivalent km after speed-of-light conversion in legacy logic
clock_units.synchronization_error_output_units: seconds/raw or ns/plotted depending on replay

measurement_units.jacobian_units: position columns dimensionless; clock columns dimensionless for range-equivalent clocks

units_review.notes: Executable fixtures verified row order and km/range-clock representation for tiny cases, but legacy all-clock/truth-gated behavior remains unsafe.

position_units.plotted_localization_conversion: legacy position error km multiplied by 1000 where plotting/reporting expects meters

clock_units.clock_error_conversion: gauge-relative range-km error divided by c_km_per_s; ns uses *1e9
clock_units.clock_sigma_input_units: seconds or ns in figure configs, converted before range-domain simulation
clock_units.synchronization_error_output_units: seconds internally, ns for plotted/reported figure metrics

measurement_units.jacobian_units: position columns dimensionless direction cosines; clock columns dimensionless range-km derivatives

units_review.notes: Package tests cover km-to-meter position output and gauge-relative clock metrics; C7 reports raw km and plotted ns explicitly.

position_units.plotted_localization_conversion: position_error_m reports Euclidean km error multiplied by 1000

units_review.notes: Units appear consistent, but system model and algorithm fidelity are suspect; do not cite as evidence.
The PDF artifacts alone do not prove the execution path or units; keep as manuscript artifacts, not code evidence.
